flow: Outer Ring Road -> Westgate Night Market Offramp/Parking -> Walk-only Blacklight Kids Connector -> Blacklight Kids nightclub district
gameplay_rules: Dry parking spaces must stay open so Donny's van can park.
Connector is walk-only; no van driving past the parking district.
Use invisible Red Concord detection cones later in Phaser.
Use parking override rectangles in Phaser if thin parking-line mask artifacts snag the van.
Westgate Night Market sign asset is included inside the off-ramp pack.

future_build_reminder.IMPERIAL_GALACTIC_NEWS_STATION: Empire propaganda news station / Red Concord media broadcast hub to build later.
